name: riverside-clinic
description: A primary care clinic from patient check-in through treatment and checkout.

resources.name: Practice Manager
resources.description: Oversees daily clinic operations, staff scheduling, compliance, and billing performance.

resources.name: Physician
resources.description: Diagnoses and treats patients, reviews medical histories, and prescribes treatments.

resources.name: Nurse
resources.description: Triages patients, records vitals, and coordinates care between physician and front desk.

resources.name: Front Desk Coordinator
resources.description: Manages scheduling, check-in, insurance verification, and patient checkout.

resources.name: Patient Visit
resources.description: End-to-end workflow from patient arrival through diagnosis and checkout.

resources.name: Check In
resources.description: Verify patient identity, confirm insurance, and collect co-pay at the front desk.

resources.name: Triage
resources.description: Record vitals, note chief complaint, and assess urgency before the physician encounter.

resources.name: Examination
resources.description: Conduct the clinical assessment, review history, and form a working diagnosis.

resources.name: Checkout
resources.description: Collect payment, schedule follow-ups, and provide after-visit instructions.

resources.name: Schedule Appointments
resources.description: Manage the appointment calendar and send confirmation reminders.

resources.name: Insurance Verification
resources.description: Confirm active coverage and benefits prior to the visit.

resources.name: Medical History Review
resources.description: Pull and review prior records to inform the current encounter.

resources.name: Write Prescription
resources.description: Issue prescriptions and log medication changes in the patient record.

resources.name: Staff Scheduling
resources.description: Set weekly shifts and ensure coverage for all clinic hours.

resources.name: Billing Oversight
resources.description: Review claim submissions, denials, and collections to maintain revenue cycle health.
